data.title: Mohegan Resorts to host Endless Midnight celebration event across five destinations from Dec. 31, 2025 to Jan. 4, 2026.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Mohegan announced the launch of its "Endless Midnight" celebration spanning from December 31, 2025, to January 4, 2026, across five destinations. This seasonal event promises New Year's Eve festivities for guests in various locations in North America.

data.title: Global market for AI-powered Fleet-Management Software valued at US$5.2B in 2024, projected to reach US$14.4B by 2030, CAGR of 18.7%.
data.description: Dublin--ResearchAndMarkets.com has added the "AI-Powered Fleet-Management Software - Global Strategic Business Report" to its offerings. The global market for AI-Powered Fleet-Management Software reached a value of US$5.2 billion in 2024 and is estimated to grow to US$14.4 billion by 2030, with a projected CAGR of 18.7% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts to assist in making strategic business decisions.

data.title: Elanco Animal Health focuses on sustainable growth, aiming for mid-single-digit organic growth with $1 billion free cash flow by 2026-2028, reducing net leverage to 2-2.5x. Expanding R&D in the US.
data.description: Elanco Animal Health, in its first Investor Day in five years, outlined a focused strategy for sustainable growth, margin expansion, and a stronger balance sheet. CEO Jeff Simmons aims for mid-single-digit organic growth and expanding profitability. The three-year outlook from 2026 includes mid-single-digit organic revenue growth, high-single-digit EBITDA growth, and low-double-digit EPS growth. Free cash flow is projected at least $1 billion from 2026-2028, with net leverage below 3x in 2027 and targeting 2.0x to 2.5x in the long term. The company also plans R&D expansion in the U.S. Noted on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Natera's new study data shows Signatera Genome test predicts breast cancer recurrence; 420 patients in US cohort.
data.description: Natera Inc. recently shared preliminary translational research findings from the Phase 3 PALLAS study at the San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. The data, based on a U.S. biomarker cohort of 420 patients, indicates that molecular residual disease (MRD) status assessed by the Signatera Genome test post-surgery, along with adjuvant chemotherapy +/- radiation if given, serves as a significant predictor of distant recurrence risk in stage II–III, HR+/HER2- breast cancer cases. This information was disclosed during the event, shedding light on the potential of this biomarker in identifying patients at risk. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rhythm Pharma reports positive early results in Phase 2 trial of setmelanotide for PWS, with 18 patients showing BMI and hyperphagia reductions. Stocks rise on NASDAQ.
data.description: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Inc. saw its stock rise on Thursday following the release of preliminary findings from its Phase 2 study on setmelanotide for Prader-Willi syndrome (PWS), a rare genetic condition known for muscle weakness and feeding challenges in infants. PWS sufferers often experience insatiable hunger and are prone to severe obesity from childhood onward, in addition to developmental delays, intellectual disability, behavioral problems, and physical traits like short stature. The study included 18 participants, and it is currently in its 52-week duration. Initial results suggest that setmelanotide therapy shows promise in reducing BMI and hyperphagia in individuals with PWS.

data.title: Sanofi receives approvals in China for rare blood disorder drugs Qfitlia and Cablivi. SNY stock rising with fourth and fifth approvals this year. Qfitlia for hemophilia and Cablivi for acquired thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura.
data.description: China's National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) has granted approval for Sanofi SA's two medications for rare hematologic conditions: Qfitlia (fitusiran) for hemophilia and Cablivi (caplacizumab) for acquired thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura. Sanofi's stock (NASDAQ: SNY) is experiencing an upward trend due to these developments. This marks the fourth and fifth approvals for Sanofi in China this year following Tzield for stage 2 type 1 diabetes and Sarclisa for two uses in relapsed and newly diagnosed multiple myeloma. Qfitlia is intended for routine prophylaxis to prevent or decrease bleeding episodes in pediatric patients aged 12 and above, as well as adults with severe hemophilia A. The approval is supported by data from the ATLAS study.

data.title: Exxon Mobil is reducing low-carbon spending, focusing on fossil fuels. Expects $25B earnings and $35B cash flow growth.
data.description: Exxon Mobil Corp's latest 2030 Plan signals a shift in focus, with decreased investment in low-carbon initiatives and increased emphasis on current profit-generating assets. The company anticipates $25 billion in earnings growth and $35 billion in cash flow growth by 2030, representing a $5 billion increase from its previous projections. Importantly, Exxon Mobil aims to achieve these improvements without raising capital spending. This strategy, which involves boosting production, reducing costs, and maintaining capital expenditure, presents a unique opportunity for investors.

data.title: Pangram 3.0 AI detector released, enhances transparency with detailed insight into text modified with AI.
data.description: Pangram 3.0 has recently been launched in New York. This latest version is designed to identify text that has been generated, modified, or reviewed using AI-driven applications.

data.title: Despite the Fed policy change, Bitcoin struggles to surpass $94,000 due to market sentiment.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin remains unable to surpass $94,000 in recent trading, despite optimism among traders regarding the long-term outlook for US monetary policy and the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: DNA&STONE Agency marks year with award-winning campaigns, Radical Empathy work, and leadership growth. Seattle, Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: In December 11, 2025, based in Seattle, DNA&STONE, a full-service agency renowned for its award-winning campaigns and Radical Empathy-driven work, successfully wrapped up its first full year. The agency has solidified its position for the future with a strengthened leadership team. The team's efforts have garnered significant recognition in the industry, positioning DNA&STONE as a key player to watch.

data.title: Pathways LA's Winter Wonderland event attracted over 900 attendees, creating a festive atmosphere for LA families.
data.description: On December 6th, 2025, in Los Angeles, Pathways LA organized its yearly Winter Wonderland Toy & Book Celebration at the Westin Bonaventure. The event aimed to create a joyous atmosphere for families in the area, drawing a large crowd from the community.

data.title: Seekr attains SOC 2 Type II Compliance, proving enterprise-grade security. Boosts trust with data protection.
data.description: An external evaluation has confirmed the effectiveness of Seekr's security measures throughout their organization and offerings. This validation allows businesses and government entities to confidently implement their AI technology with assurance. Seekr, based in RESTON, Va., received this affirmation on Dec. 11, 2025, bolstering its reputation as a trusted provider of explainable and reliable artificial intelligence solutions for enterprises.

data.title: Deloitte to ignite innovation at CES 2026, using technology to secure competitive advantage for clients. #LasVegas #Dec112025.
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 11, 2025, Deloitte is hosting an event at CES® 2026 aimed at assisting organizations in defining their future and gaining a competitive advantage. Through the integration of extensive business expertise and cutting-edge technologies, Deloitte is aiding clients in achieving their goals.
